positions.name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Core broad market exposure to S&P 500. IE-domiciled accumulating structure eliminates 30% WHT on distributions. Held as the portfolio anchor — largest position by design.
invalidation_conditions: Structural shift away from US equities as the dominant long-term growth engine
A superior WHT-efficient broad market vehicle becomes available

positions.name: Amazon.com Inc
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy entered just before/during Liberation Day tariff announcement. Core thesis: AWS dominance, advertising growth, and AI infrastructure spend make AMZN a compounder. No dividend means no WHT drag.
invalidation_conditions: AWS loses meaningful cloud market share to Azure or GCP
Regulatory breakup that separates AWS from retail
Sustained margin compression across all segments

positions.name: SPDR Gold Shares
positions.thesis: Macro hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical risk, and inflationary pressure. Gold has no cash flows so no WHT exposure. Held as a portfolio stabilizer.
invalidation_conditions: Sustained USD strengthening cycle driven by structurally higher real rates
Major reversal in central bank gold buying trend
Risk-off environment resolves and portfolio needs redeployment into equities

positions.name: Mastercard Inc
positions.wht_exposure: Low — dividend yield <1%, WHT impact negligible
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy during Liberation Day volatility. Thesis: payments network with near-monopoly duopoly economics, asset-light model, global consumer spending exposure, pricing power. Dividend yield too small to materially erode returns via WHT.
invalidation_conditions: Disintermediation by real-time payment rails (e.g. FedNow, open banking) at scale
Regulatory caps on interchange fees in core markets
Sustained global consumer spending contraction

positions.name: NVIDIA Corporation
positions.thesis: AI infrastructure buildout driving unprecedented GPU demand. NVDA holds dominant position in AI training and inference hardware. CUDA ecosystem creates high switching costs. Hold position — thesis intact as long as AI capex cycle continues.
invalidation_conditions: AMD or custom silicon (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium) takes meaningful share in AI training
AI capex cycle reverses — hyperscalers cut infrastructure spend
Export restrictions to China materially impact revenue beyond current guidance

positions.name: ASML Holding NV
positions.thesis: Monopoly supplier of EUV lithography machines — no competitor exists. Every leading-edge chip fab (TSMC, Samsung, Intel) depends on ASML. Only non-US equity in the portfolio. Target: build to ~6% of NAV. 15% WHT acceptable given monopoly quality.
invalidation_conditions: China develops a credible domestic EUV alternative (long-dated risk, 5-10 year horizon)
Semiconductor capex supercycle ends and fab customers cancel/delay orders at scale
Dutch government export restrictions beyond current ASML guidance

positions.name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 0-3 Month UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Cash equivalent / capital preservation layer. Replaces SGOV which carried 30% WHT on distributions. US Treasury interest paid to Irish fund is exempt from NRA withholding under the portfolio interest exemption — 0% effective WHT vs 30% on SGOV. Near-zero duration risk (0-3M).
invalidation_conditions: Fed cuts rates aggressively — opportunity cost of holding cash equivalent rises
Better WHT-efficient fixed income vehicle identified
Portfolio grows large enough that cash drag justifies full equity deployment
